steps.title: Identify the key contrast signal
steps.content: The sentence pairs two siblings: “one sibling might inherit brown eyes; the other sibling, ______ might inherit green eyes.” The word “other” signals that we're contrasting different inherited traits.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”By contrast” directly marks this opposition. The other three each signal elaboration, consequence, or sequence rather than contrast. That matches choice D — D is correct.
